title: PC Jeweller is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: PC Jeweller is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, PC Jeweller in Howrah is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About PC Jeweller:
PC Jeweller is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PC Jeweller!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
